creator: info@babaei.net
text:
It works when I set CPUTYPE to nehalem. I have 323 other packages built with skylake-avx512 as CPUTYPE and they all build and work just fine.

$ sysctl -a | egrep -i 'hw.machine|hw.model|hw.ncpu'
hw.machine: amd64
hw.model: Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 6136 CPU @ 3.00GHz
hw.ncpu: 2
hw.machine_arch: amd64

$ cat /etc/make.conf
CPUTYPE?=skylake-avx512
#CPUTYPE?=nehalem

$ make
